2fa-device-ip.description: IP address of the device used to respond to or complete the MFA challenge.

2fa-device-location.description: Geographic location associated with the MFA device IP (e.g., city, region, country).

access-device-browser.description: Web browser or client application used on the access device.

access-device-ip.description: IP address of the device initiating the authentication request.

access-device-location.description: Geographic location associated with the access device IP (e.g., city, region, country).

access-device-os.description: Operating system of the device initiating the authentication request.

analysis-note.description: Additional contextual notes or summary of the investigation and findings.

factor.description: Authentication factor or method used for MFA (e.g., push notification, SMS, phone call, hardware token).

incident-datetime.description: UTC timestamp indicating when the MFA authentication event occurred.

integration.description: Application, service, or system being accessed during the MFA event (e.g., VPN, SSO, cloud service).

outcome.description: Final classification of the MFA event (e.g., benign, suspicious, confirmed compromise, MFA fatigue).

reason.description: Explanation or justification for the assigned outcome, based on observed activity or analyst investigation.

user.description: Anonymized user identifier associated with the MFA event.

description: Object describing a multi-factor authentication (MFA) event, including anonymized user identifiers, authentication method, network source information, device context, and analyst-derived outcome and reasoning.
name: mfa-auth
